sentences.arabic: اِخْتَارَ أَحْمَدُ مِهْنَةَ التَّعْلِيمِ لِأَنَّهُ يُحِبُّ مُسَاعَدَةَ الطُّلَّابِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je izabrao profesiju podučavanja jer voli pomagati učenicima.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmad chose the teaching profession because he loves helping students.

sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ الْآنَ مُدَرِّسًا لِلُّغَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ فِي مَدْرَسَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Sada radi kao nastavnik arapskog jezika u jednoj velikoj školi.
sentences.translationEn: He now works as an Arabic language teacher in a large school.

sentences.arabic: يَشْعُرُ بِالسَّعَادَةِ عِنْدَمَا يَرَى تَقَدُّمَ طُلَّابِهِ فِي الدِّرَاسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Osjeća se sretnim kada vidi napredak svojih učenika u učenju.
sentences.translationEn: He feels happy when he sees his students' progress in their studies.
